strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, with fluency in multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java, etc.)
Entrepreneurial and open-source contributions, including founding GISCollective and building AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq
Strong leadership in technical education and mentorship, evidenced by workshops, talks, and community engagement (e.g., Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, despite 15+ years of experience
Limited explicit evidence of deep AI/ML expertise or building AI-powered products/platforms at scale
Geographic location (Nigeria) may pose logistical challenges for a Berlin-based role, though remote work is unconfirmed
response.justification: The candidate meets the 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates strong technical breadth (e.g., full-stack development, infrastructure, and open-source projects like GISCollective). However, the role prioritizes AI strategy and cloud differentiation, where the resume lacks concrete evidence of deep AI/ML product development or recognized expertise. Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) and leadership in technical education are positive but secondary to the core AI/ML gap. No advanced degree further weakens alignment with preferred qualifications.
